items.title: Prediction: This Company Is All Set to Hit a $5 Trillion Market Cap in 2026 (Hint: It's Not Nvidia)
items.description: This tech giant's early entry into the AI space has helped it build a substantial revenue backlog that could propel its shares higher in 2026.

items.title: Should You Buy Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stocks In 2026?
items.description: It depends on which ones and what you believe about the future of the sector.

items.title: How the World of Work Will Change Over the Next 20 Years
items.description: People are working past the typical retirement age of 65, which means there are five generations in the workplace, all with different work and management styles.  The next two decades will bring even more consequential change, with artificial intelligence driving much of the reshaping of work.  It will have an impact on the role of managers, how organizations measure business outcomes and accelerate tasks that once took months.

items.title: If You Invested $5,000 in CoreWeave at Its March IPO, Here’s How Much You’d Have Today
items.description: CoreWeave (NASDAQ:CRWV) investors received a welcome reprieve yesterday as its shares surged 22% amid two key developments. The company announced participation in the Energy Dept.’s Genesis Mission, an initiative to accelerate scientific research, national security, and energy innovation through AI and supercomputing. items.title: Next Data Center Roadblock For Google, Microsoft, Oracle, Meta Is On Main Street
items.description: The data centers critical to the nation's AI ambitions are spawning local political battles as rising energy costs frustrate communities. What investors need to know about data center NIMBYism.
